summary: Chapter 5 drafted successfully. All three required scenes executed: Kaelith discovers suppressed Pallor reports in garrison archives (SCN-013), Lirien reveals kill contract and explains paradox (SCN-014), Kaelith learns she carries Quietus location as kinetic memory (SCN-015). Word count 4187 exceeds minimum 3800. Voice fingerprinting maintained throughout — Kaelith's short declarative sentences, counting behavior, architectural metaphors, suppressed emotional register all present and consistent with established character voice. Lirien's clinical precision and classification language audible in all dialogue. Major revelation chapter executing dual-arc convergence: fantasy beat (Quietus paradox) and romance beat (kill contract admission) both require same decision (leave together). Emotional arc: Kaelith transitions from self-loathing and forced alliance to pragmatic acceptance of necessity, applying Calwrath arithmetic to world-scale stakes. Chapter ends with commitment to departure, setting up Act I finale. All craft tools applied per profile: tone contract maintained (no melodrama, compressed reactions), stakes escalated from personal to existential, vulnerability ladder advanced (Lirien's informational surrender), thematic scaffolding progressed (trust-as-necessity, arithmetic of terrible choices). Tracker artifacts updated: foreshadowing ledger, information asymmetry map, mystery box inventory, emotional throughline, symbolic motif registry.
